title: Shard manifest (shard.yaml)
description: The top-level manifest for a ShardMind shard. Lives at the root of the shard repository and declares identity, versioning, hooks, and dependencies. Validated on every install/update.

apiVersion.description: Schema version of shard.yaml. v1 is the only accepted value in v0.x.

name.description: Package name within its namespace. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only. Example: "obsidian-mind".

namespace.description: Owner namespace. Typically your GitHub username or organization. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only.

description.description: Short human-readable summary of the shard. Shown in the install wizard.

persona.description: Who this shard is for. Displayed in the install header (e.g., "AI-augmented research vaults").

homepage.description: URL to the shard's project page or documentation.

requires.description: Environment requirements. ShardMind does not enforce these in v0.1 but tooling may warn.

node.description: Minimum Node.js version required for hook execution (semver range).

dependencies.description: Other shards this shard depends on. Vendored in v0.1 (must be pre-installed in the vault); auto-fetched in v0.2+.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hook file paths (relative to the shard root).

post-install.description: Path to a TypeScript file whose default export runs after `shardmind install`.

post-update.description: Path to a TypeScript file whose default export runs after `shardmind update`.
